message:
test(resize): add 44 state machine tests for resize scheduler lifecycle (wa-1u90p.7.1)

- Full lifecycle: submit → schedule → phase walk → complete
- Supersession: active cancel, pending replace, completion rejection
- Non-monotonic sequence rejection, equal-sequence rejection
- Kill-switch/gate suppression and re-enable recovery
- Multi-pane scheduling, budget fairness, interactive priority
- Starvation forcing after repeated deferrals
- Overload admission policy (queue full, interactive eviction)
- Deferral drop (stale pending cleanup)
- Phase transition edge cases (wrong seq, non-active pane, backwards)
- Input guardrail budget reservation and threshold behavior
- Storm detection per-tab throttling and cross-tab independence
- Domain budget partitioning and throttling
- Multi-frame drain, concurrent active+pending, single-flight
- Oversubscription allowed/blocked, serialization round-trips
- Snapshot/debug introspection, stalled transaction detection
- Metric accounting across complex multi-pane lifecycle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
